creator: frank.brendel@eurolog.com
text:
Sorry, but I can't start this version.

fatal: script_exec: invalid host id


Am 22.05.2011 12:23, schrieb Martin Matuska:
> I have backported the very latest version of relayd that should =
address
> these issues.
>
> Could you please try the updated port and report if it solves the =
issue?
> http://people.freebsd.org/~mm/ports/net-relayd-4.9.20110522.tar.gz
>
> The updated port does not implement:
> carp, routers, snmp
